plugin_desc: Siemens SCALANCE X 工业以太网交换机专用 SNMP 采集模板（Siemens AUTOMATION-SMI，企业号 4329）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 SCALANCE 私有 OID 的设备健康指标：机箱温度（℃）与双路电源线状态（经 telegraf processors.enum 归一为 1=正常/2=异常）。SCALANCE X 基于网管桥 ASIC，多为无风扇导热式被动散热设计，私有 MIB 未以标量形式暴露 CPU 与内存负载，故 CPU、内存与风扇为 N/A。适用品牌型号——西门子 SCALANCE X 系列工业网管交换机（X200/X300/X400/XB/XC/XR 系列，企业号 4329）。
name: Switch

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Chassis temperature of the SCALANCE industrial switch in degrees Celsius (Siemens AUTOMATION-SMI chassis temperature).

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: Power-supply line state of the SCALANCE industrial switch, normalised to 1=normal / 2=abnormal.
